Hero.badge: Built for Morocco · Darija Voice Input
Hero.description: Finally, a budgeting app made for real life in Morocco. No complicated spreadsheets. No confusing finance terms. Just speak naturally, track your spending, and understand where your money goes.
Hero.socialProofText: Built for everyday life in Morocco

Features.heading: Finally, budgeting that feels natural
Features.description: No typing. No friction. No excuses. Just natural tracking that helps you stay in control without making budgeting stressful.
Features.feature0Description: Send a voice note in Moroccan Darija and Floussi.Pro turns it into organized expenses automatically.
Features.feature1Title: Know Exactly Where Your Money Goes
Features.feature1Description: See your spending by month, week, or custom periods so you understand your habits before money disappears.
Features.feature2Description: Set category limits for food, transport, rent, shopping, family, and bills with alerts before overspending.
Features.feature3Description: Instantly view total spending, remaining budget, monthly income estimate, trends, top categories, and transactions.
Features.feature4Description: Great for saving money, managing family expenses, reducing impulsive spending, and planning each month better.
Features.feature5Description: Supports Darija voice input, your preferred currency, and a clean mobile-first interface for daily usage.

AISection.description: Just send a voice note in Moroccan Darija. Floussi.Pro automatically turns your voice into organized expenses so you can focus on better decisions.
AISection.featureNatural: Track naturally in the language you use every day

CTA.description: They just need a simple way to answer: "Fin mchaw floussi?" Create your account and start tracking your money in minutes.
CTA.trustLine: No complicated spreadsheets · No confusing finance terms · Just clarity

Footer.tagline: Your AI growth partner for productivity and finances.

Dashboard.periodInfo: Showing data for your current period: {periodName}.
Dashboard.noPeriod: Set up a tracking period to start seeing your data here.
